auth_notes: Requires an Indeed Developer account and application approval. Uses OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Grant with specific scopes for Employer or Publisher APIs.
rate_limits: Varies by endpoint; typically 100 requests per minute for standard access, but highly dependent on the specific API product and agreement.
gotchas: API access is not self-service; users must apply for access and wait for manual approval from Indeed's partner team.
Indeed has strict 'Attribution' and 'Look and Feel' requirements for displaying job data.
The API is fragmented into different products (Job Search, Employer, Sponsored Jobs) each with different access levels.
research_notes: Development must use the HTTP Request node. n8n's 'Generic OAuth2 API' credential type should be used. The Authorization URL is https://secure.indeed.com/oauth/v2/authorize and the Access Token URL is https://lp.indeed.com/oauth/v2/tokens. Note that some older Indeed APIs use a simple API Key (Publisher ID), but modern integrations require OAuth.
